name: driftlock
description: Completeness-first UX-first AI development delegation harness.

interface.longDescription: Driftlock is a completeness-first UX-first AI development delegation harness. It combines 20 first-class Driftlock skills with vendored Spec Kit, Superpowers, Compound Engineering, and gstack reference contracts so agents can clarify product intent, approve product shape, lock specs, execute with worktrees, review with proof, compound repeated failures, and hand off only after all gates pass.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Driftlock to clarify my product intent, show me the product shape first, lock the approved spec, and execute it through a gated long-horizon agent workflow.
